enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the theme of Kanna Kaattu Podhum?

The song is a romantic melody that expresses deep love and affection.

Who composed the music for Rekka?

The music for Rekka was composed by D Imman.

Who is the singer of Kanna Kaattu Podhum?

The song is sung by the talented Shreya Ghoshal.

What role does the song play in the movie Rekka?

The song beautifully portrays the romantic moments between the lead characters, enhancing the emotional depth of the film.

When was Kanna Kaattu Podhum released?

The song was released in the year 2016.
enrichedMetadata.summary: In the movie Rekka, Kanna Kaattu Podhum is a romantic melody that highlights the tender moments between the lead characters. Sung by Shreya Ghoshal, the song's soothing composition by D Imman and heartfelt lyrics by Yugabharathi convey a deep sense of love and longing. The track beautifully captures the essence of romance, making it a perfect fit for moments of love and affection. Its gentle tunes and emotional depth evoke a sense of warmth and connection, resonating with anyone who has experienced love.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Experience the enchanting melody of Kanna Kaattu Podhum from the movie Rekka, where Shreya Ghoshal's soulful voice meets D Imman's mesmerizing composition. This romantic duet captures the essence of love with its soothing tunes and heartfelt lyrics by Yugabharathi. Dive into a world of emotions with this beautiful track that promises to touch your heart.
stanzaMeanings: I will come with you, just show me the way. Ask me what you want, I will give it without holding back.
The love is intense, you are taking my breath away.
This relationship is not temporary, it will always be strong.
You have tested me with love.
I will come with you, just show me the way. Ask me what you want, I will give it without holding back.
The love is intense, you are taking my breath away.
This relationship is not temporary, it will always be strong.
You have tested me with love.
Your thoughts rain like flowers in my heart, making me sleepy.
Your smile keeps poking my thoughts.
When you speak stubbornly, I close my mouth and stay silent.
I will come to your house from the open fields.
With just a few words, you have hurt me.
The hot sun shines, and the wings have sprouted. Listen to the parrot's words.
I will come with you, just show me the way. Ask me what you want, I will give it without holding back.
When I touch your hands, your darkness changes me.
Your beauty hits me like a wave.
Even if I gather all the distances, I can't bear you being far away.
With desire in bed, my eyes won't sleep. Seeing you, my heart dances.
I can't express it, I have to keep you in my heart like a secret.
I will come with you, just show me the way. Ask me what you want, I will give it without holding back.
